titleStmt.title: SII 22.262: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 262. (A.R. No. 262 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, NARASAMAṄGALAM. ON THE SAME STONE.

summary.p: This is a Tamil version of No. 261 above. It is dated in Śaka 1560, Bahudhānya, Vaiyāśi 4 corresponding to A.D. 1638, May 2, and records the construction of a tank at Dūśi-Māvaṇḍūr called Chennasāgaram which was fed by a canal from the river Pālār, by one Veṇkaṭappa-Nāyakkar son of Chennappa-Nāyakkar, who is given a number of high-sounding panegyrics.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatu vicayābhyutaya cālivākana caka varuṣaṅkaḷ
1000 5 100 6 10-kkumel cellānikkiṟa pekutāniya varuṣam vaiyā
ci mātam 4 tiyati śrīmattu makula nāyakarumāy tāmal ciṅkaraca nākicuraṉu
māy Iṟaikālakottira pavuttiraṉumāy Uttaṇṭapuliyamāṟa
kālakaṇṭa kavaḷica kacciravāttoṟtaṇṭi cikevālūri
puravarāticuvara Itu mutalāṉa virutukaḷ paṭaittavaṉumāy
Aneka cattiratārappiṟatiyāpakaṉumāy paratāra paratanaṅkaḷai
Ācaippaṭātavaṉumāy Aṇṭiṉarkkātāraṉumāy rāyakā
riya niṟuvākakaṉumāy tevappirāmaṇa pūcātaṟparaṉumā
y padvacamuttiraṉumāy cattiya vācakam tappātavaṉu
māy piṟatikkinā paracurāmaṉumāy caḷāya(ḷayā) tairiya
parākkiṟama cākacavikkiramārkkaṉumāy tānattuṇṇum
cakala vittiyāviceṣanitiyumāy tirutayāparaṉumāy
veṅkaṭappa nāyakkarukku peraṉumāy ceṉṉappa nāyakar
kumāraṉumāna veṅkaṭappanāyakkar tammupayamāka
pitākkaḷiṭa kulattil piṟan=tatavarkaḷukku puṇṇiyamum Uṇṭā
kaveṇumeṉṟu pekuvāka tiraviyam cilaviṭṭu cakala
canaṅkaḷukku Upayokamāka tūcimāvaṇṭūril Ā
can=tirāṟkkattāyiyāka Eri kaṭṭiviccu ceṉṉacākara
meṉṟu periṭṭu pālāṟatu cārilum koṇṭu va
ntu viṭuviccu Anan=tamāna cuki patamum kiṟttiyum Aṭai
n=tār veṅkaṭappa nāyakar colpaṭikku māvakaṟal
kalaṅkamur nākappa mutaliyār kumāraṉ yellappa muta
liyār Atikāriyāka niṟutti In=ta Eri kaṭṭiviccār pālāṟatu
kālum koṇṭuvantu viṭiviccār rāyacayyar .
Digital edition of SII 22.262 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
